title: oxalis extensa
intro: Oxalis extensa, also known as the False Sorrel or Wood Sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Oxalis extensa include its potential to reduce blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, and support digestive health. Oxalis extensa can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
